All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

C

Cart - Class in Business
Represents a shopping cart that contains products from different shops.
Cart() - Constructor for class Business.Cart
Constructs a new Cart with default values for its properties.
CartManager - Class in Business
Represents the manager of the manager of the cart which helps with all its actions.
CartManager() - Constructor for class Business.CartManager
Constructs a new CartManager with an associated shopping cart.
catalogue - Variable in class Business.Shops.Shop
The list of products in the shop's catalog.
closeShops() - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Displays a closing message when the user exits the application.
Controller - Class in Presentation
The Controller class handles user input, manages the flow of the program, and interacts with the UI, ProductManager, ShopManager, and CartManager.
Controller() - Constructor for class Presentation.Controller
Constructs a new Controller with associated UI, ProductManager, ShopManager, and CartManager instances.
correctProductBrand(String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Corrects the product brand format.
correctProductName(String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Checks if the provided product name is correct.
correctProductPriceMax(String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Checks if the provided product price is correct.
correctRating(String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Checks if the provided rating string is correct.
correctShopName(String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if the provided shop name is correct by verifying its uniqueness among existing shops.
correctShopYear(String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if the provided attribute for a shop's founding year is correct.
countAsterisks(String) - Method in class Business.ProductManager
Counts the number of asterisks in a rating.
CreateDirectoryException - Exception Class in Exceptions
Custom exception class for handling directory creation-related exceptions in the ProductJsonDAO.
CreateDirectoryException(String) - Constructor for exception class Exceptions.CreateDirectoryException
Constructs a new CreateDirectoryException with the specified error message.
